note: After corrective retry, if blocks2 is empty, runPlanReviewerWithRetry now returns an error instead of nil findings. Changed in internal/app/plan_review.go (~line 284).
Same fix as f_001: the corrective-retry path now explicitly errors when the response still has no valid pactum.reviewer_findings.v1alpha1 block, preventing silent clean-exit.

writePlanReviewerOutputFormat now says 'Always include exactly one findings block. Use an empty array when there are no issues.' instead of the old contradictory 'Do not include an empty findings block.' (internal/app/plan_review.go:485).

Added isValidPlanReviewLens helper and a skip in planFindingsFromBlocks for any finding whose lens is not in planReviewLenses. Invalid-lens findings are silently dropped before JSON output (internal/app/plan_review.go).

TestPlanReviewHelperProcess now emits an empty pactum.reviewer_findings.v1alpha1 block (via planReviewerEmptyFindingsOutput) when PACTUM_PLAN_REVIEWER_EMIT_FINDINGS is unset; updated test comment accordingly. TestPlanReviewNoFindingsExitsZero still expects exit 0 — the reviewer now satisfies the mandatory block requirement with an empty findings array (internal/app/plan_review_test.go).

Added TestPlanReviewMultipleReviewers (plan_review_test.go) which configures helper1 and helper2, verifies per-reviewer prompt.txt and attempt-1.txt artifacts, and confirms findings.json contains entries from both agents. Also added plan_review to the accepted panel stages in TestReadConfigPipelineMultiAgentByValidation (config_test.go).

Removed the early-return guard 'if len(stdoutBytes1) == 0 { return []planReviewFinding{}, nil }' in runPlanReviewerWithRetry; empty stdout now falls through to the corrective retry path just like prose-only output (internal/app/plan_review.go:260).

Updated docs/flow.md: added pactum plan review to the stages table Contract row, and added a full prose paragraph documenting the plan review command, pipeline.plan_review.by config, the five lenses, the mandatory findings block requirement, artifact layout, exit codes, and --json output.

Updated docs/flow.md Contract section to document the VACUOUS_VALIDATION rule: tasks with non-empty expected_files must have at least one validation command scoped to those files; global-only commands are rejected with VACUOUS_VALIDATION; tasks with empty expected_files are exempt.
